user.title: AirGradient public location
user.description: Enter the location ID of a public AirGradient monitor. Open the sensor on the [AirGradient map]({map_url}) and use the `locationId` shown by the API, e.g. 66612.

error.invalid_location: No public location with this ID was found.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the AirGradient API.
